title: ChemicalCraft
description:
This mod adds various aspects of chemistry.
For example: Graphite, Steel Tools, Tungsten Armor, etc.
The mod has localization in Russian and English.
The mod is in development, all versions up to 1.8.2 ask me in Discord: nickolla_tesla
body:
**ChemicalCraft** is a large mod for chemistry and similar things.
To use the mod easily, install JEI.
I divide it into 3 parts
1. **Standard chemistry** (Examples: Aluminum, polyethylene, rubber)
2. **Metallurgy and industry** (Examples: Stainless steel, diamond drill, electrical circuitry)
3. **Nuclear physics** (Examples: Uranium, plutonium, thermonuclear bomb).

Let's get started!

**1.STANDARD CHEMISTRY**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc6b0117452414a21a9634ac73ca9d71f4704d1c.png)
The beginning of the chemistry in this mod is very simple, first craft a flask, it is created as a bottle, but with additional glass on top of it.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b00f50ea366382c66c3900c5d005f72c18b1fa53.png)

In the flasks you can put water, putting them 4 flasks and a bucket of water
After that the chemistry itself begins.

In the fashion there are a lot of chemical elements that can be obtained with the help of flasks.
These include Rubber, Polyethylene, Polypropylene, Polystyrene, Polyethylene Chloride, Polytetrafluoroethylene and others items.

There's also a metal that can be chemically produced, namely aluminum.
I gave up unrealistic and aluminum ore, now it is a real kind of it - Bauxite, from it can be obtained with the help of crafts and electrolysis lead battery to get aluminum ingot.
Almost all powders can be obtained in the stonecutter.

**2.METALLURGY AND INDUSTRY**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b505ebf29a3ded087dee2a35101909f0ad9f6e31.png)
Metalurgy includes all almost all ingots of the mod, except aluminum, because it is obtained chemically.

Metallurgy starts this mod for you, because you need to get coke coal in the smokehouse, turn it into powder in the stonecutter, and then add it to the 6 ingots of iron in the crafting table.

You will get steel, a stronger alternative to iron that is needed for many crafts, including stainless steel, which requires a steel bucket.

Metallurgy also includes other metals: For example, decorative brass and bronze, which are only used to decorate your buildings.

There are also industrial items: For example, electrical circuits, which require copper wires and quartz, not the one in the Nether, but in the upper world, in the form of ore.

There are batteries and big batteries, batteries are used for crafting, and batteries are created from them.

A battery is used to create a diamond drill, an item that digs 12 times faster than a neserite pickaxe, but needs to be repaired with batteries.
It is possible to create a computer - although it is not very useful and is a decoration, its other kind will be needed in the next part of the mod. The latest...

**3.NUCLEAR PHYSICS**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d012803c87efc22ff30096e545f301c9cd695ec.png)
Nuclear physics begins with the mining of uranium underground and its processing into stonecutter.

After that you can enrich it to get enriched uranium, and with it and ordinary uranium you can create nuclear fuel rods, which are needed to build a nuclear reactor
To build a nuclear reactor you will need a nuclear drawing, which illustrates the layers of a nuclear reactor in section.

Once the reactor is built, it will start working, which you can tell by the sound near it, but it will take **5 HOURS** for the nuclear fuel to become spent.
After that, start reprocessing it, which consists of throwing this rod into a cratfing table, blast furcane, smoker, and stonecutter.

Then, after 30 levels of recycling, you will get radioactive elements - Neptunium, Plutonium, and Americium

Only Plutonium and Amerithium will be needed to create the **TSAR BOMB**, and about its properties you can try to understand yourself...

There is also an antiradiation armor set created from antiradiation composite for protection against radiation.


**_This is the full description of the ChemicalCraft mod, see you soon!_**
